scripts.compact: compact compile src/polypay.compact src/managed/polypay && compact compile src/token.compact src/managed/token && compact compile src/test-shielded.compact src/managed/test-shielded
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -Rf ./src/managed ./dist/managed && cp ./src/polypay.compact ./dist && cp ./src/token.compact ./dist
